title: Amphibious speeder
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Amphibious speeders''' were vehicles that could travel both in the air and underwater. In air, they used [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlifts]], and for underwater travel [[Turbothruster/Legends|turbothrust engines]] were used. They were rare and very expensive, but many were found on [[Muunilinst/Legends|Muunilinst]].

{{Veh-stub}}
